title: Research-backed lighting advice for better decisions.
intro: Our team studies customer questions, online search behavior, showroom insights, and lighting industry trends to help shoppers choose fixtures, finishes, bulbs, and layouts with confidence.
questionTitle: This week's most asked lighting questions

guides.title: How to Choose the Right Size Chandelier for Your Dining Room
guides.question: What size chandelier do I need for my dining table?
guides.summary: Room and table formulas, hanging height, and FAQ — the pro sizing guide for dining chandeliers.

guides.title: What Color Temperature Is Best for Chandeliers? The Complete Bulb Guide
guides.question: What color temperature is best for chandeliers?
guides.summary: 2700K warm white, dimmable LED, and CRI 90+ — plus base sizes, bulb shapes, and dimmer tips.

guides.title: How Many Lights Should You Have in Your Kitchen?
guides.question: How many pendant lights do I need over an island?
guides.summary: A simple guide to spacing pendants, layering task lighting, and avoiding dark work zones.

guides.title: How to Pick the Right Finish for Your Lighting Fixtures
guides.question: Should lighting finishes match hardware?
guides.summary: Understand when to match, contrast, or mix finishes so the room feels intentional.

guides.title: Pendant Lighting vs Island Lighting - What's the Difference?
guides.question: Are pendant lights and island lights the same thing?
guides.summary: Clear up common kitchen lighting confusion before choosing the wrong fixture type.

guides.title: How to Layer Lighting in Your Living Room
guides.question: How do I make a living room feel warm but bright enough?
guides.summary: Combine ambient, task, and accent lighting to avoid a flat or harsh room.

guides.title: Outdoor Lighting Ideas for Your Home's Exterior
guides.question: What outdoor lights improve curb appeal?
guides.summary: Use wall lights, path lights, and warm color temperatures to make the exterior feel polished and welcoming.
